Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Advanced From Dec-09-02 To Oct-01-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FAREDAH TOTAH Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award And For Rehearing:
APPEAR: Faredah S. Totah, 826-3007 petitioner & moving party in pro per w/ son Raymond Totah, translator; Jason E. Turner, Esq. 650/289-1400 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD DENIED). Court will not allow attorneys fees or costs. Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/AS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
